TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Al-payse a buyu'ťėŅÁąĺŚćĎśĖĮŚĪĪ nilacilan Al-payse a buyu' ; "kamunu te sa Alpen ('alpnŐ©) ; nu yi-tali sa ; Alpi ('alpi)Ôľõnu huwaku sa :Alpes Ôľõse-lu-wiy-ni-ya:Alpe ('√°ňźlp…õ)Ôľõlu-man-ca:Alps)nu u-cu satalakaway atu mulakuwitay tu liwliw nu buyubuyu'an , mamin matahab ku yi-ta-li nu amisan a laad ,huwaku nu walian atu nu timulan ,zuyse ,li-se-tun-se-ten, aw-ti-li teku nu timulan atu se-lu-wiy-ni-ya . ťėŅÁąĺŚćĎśĖĮŚĪĪ(Śĺ∑Ť™ě:Alpen ('alpnŐ©) ÔľõÁĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ť™ě:Alpi ('alpi)Ôľõś≥ēŤ™ě:Alpes ÔľõśĖĮśīõÁ∂≠ŚįľšļěŤ™ě:Alpe ('√°ňźlp…õ)ÔľõÁĺÖśõľšĽÄŤ™ě:Alps) . wiynisa kapah sadep han palatulu , namakayni i ti-cung hay katukuh pay-lang-hung nu tipan alpayse-abuyu' , namakayni walaytaawseta katukuh pulunna tatahekalan nu buyu' "awtili atu yitali nikalalacal matatihepa" nu tebanay nu alpayse a buyu' namakayni i pulunna a katahekalan nu buyu' katukuh seluwiyniya nu walian alpayse a buyu' . u u-cu yadahay a balad namakayni namin, u nanum nida u kapahay , u aidangan, sasalamaan, u sapakapah tu udip akitidaan. Alpayse abuyu' mamin idaw ku 128 a buyu' malakuwit ku 4000 a depah nu talakaw , ya cacayay satalakaway u pay-lang a tungdud u talakaw nida 4810.45 a depah , tini i nu huwa-ku atu yi-tali nu kasalaadan . u nikatatihepa nu buyubuyu'an mahida u bangah , u tanayu'sa 1200 akuli , ahebal sa 130~260 kuli , palecad han u talakaw sa 3000 a depah , pulung nu ahebal sa tutu a emang cubu kuli . Al-payse abuyu' nu amisan u nanum nu bali kuyadahay , u timulan sa maacak kuytiniay a demiad , inayay ku udad . . Al-payse a buyu nu saka lu a nikatepik nu buyubuyu'an . nuwalian a bayu' macebal, kyu u huy-cu, u-cu nu lalaaatilad masasetul musaungay ; yu mahidahenay sa , nu hu-cu maletak ya masaatiladay maisid pasayda I nu amisan, yu mahida mautang tu malingatu atu u-cu a masaatiladay masasetul , kinapina mahahabelut kumaputun , u tabakiay nu sapitahab tu kaku nida maadih kuwayway , wiyda u kasasetul nu atilad sa , haymawsa tapabaw mu tahekal mala Al-payse abuyu' . tabakiay a matahab ku kaku nida wayway , wiyda I madsaatiladay a nika sasetul sa , kinapina pihaceng ku kasasetul nu picih , mabelin ku tabakiay a masabaetuay , maisid tu pina a kuli matahab ku duma a baetu i pabaw , kyu malatabakiay a nisadepan a mitepik ; nu tipan sa u Al-payse u masadumaay a kaku kuyda . Al-payse a buyubuyu'an nu tatelungan sa , idaw henay ku sip a masedal pakayni i teban nu timulan a kitidaan ; u cacay pasada i nu tipan micumud i yi-pi-li a subal , u pi-li-niw-se a buyubuyu'an ; pasayda nu timilan u ya-pi-nin a buyubuyu'an, wiysasa masa ya-pi-nin nu subal tu tatelunagn ; amisan atu timulan u ngangan nida sa u ti-na-la a buyubuyu'an , mamin mabalat ku pal-kan a subal nu tipan , micumud i ti-cung-hay a bayu', macaliway i li-te a subalatu say-pulse a subal patelek sa katukuh i adidiay a subal ; nu walian atu amisan idaw kya cacay u kel-pacin a buyubuyu'an , itida i tung-u a masaenalay nu timulan idaw kya masangangiway kinatusa mungangiw tu makayda i paw-ciya-liya patelke han katukuh i duutay a bayu han . . Al-payse a buyubuyu'an paini tu u-cu tu nananuman , sapananum tu u mah a tu sapadingki . :p.5. Al-payse a buyubuyu'an u ahebal nida kanahatu hatu nu u-cu nu 11%, nika paini tu u-cu 90% nu pabawan sananuman , yu kakedalan nu demiad atu lalud . u milan a tukay idaw ku 80% namakayniay naming i Al-payse a buyubuyu'an nipain .ÁĪ≥Ťė≠Á≠ČŚüéŚłāŚįĪśúČ80% :p.9:p.1. u balad nukalikid idaw ku 500 a nikalakalak nulalaliwan sapi padingki , nu mihcaan nu sapadingki makaalatu 29 iku nu wa-te . :p.8. namaka zuy-se nu u-cu ku tatelunga a balad a malikid , mahida u lay-in a balad lung a balad, in a balad, ti-ci-nu a balad atu pu a balad , u tatangahan namakayni naming i Al-payse a buyubuyu'an , malikid tayda macapiaya akanatal , sadikuday sa micumud i amis a bayu', ti-cung a bayu', ya-te-li-ya a bayu' atu lumeniay a bayu' . duma a balad mahida u tu-naw a balad , tatelunan nu namakay Al-payse a buyubuyu'an . . u lung a balad nu ti-cung a bayuay saka tu a tabakiay a sapananum, malusasa nu ni-lu a balad ; u sulsuldaan yu amalawpes tu mala nu lung a balad nu nananuman , micumud i ze-nay-wa a banaw sa malikid aca taydai hu-waku , i huwaku sapi pacueded tu he-nen a dingki . lay-in a balad namakay zuwiy-se nu cacay a 30 acubu nu kuli a kitidaan , micalap ku zuwiy-se nipatahekal tu nanum sa 60% . 60%. Al-payse a buyubuyu'an idaw ku mada banaway , u ze-nay-wa u masa buladay a masabnaway, tapiingan nu zuy-se u ze-nay-wa , duma atapiingan sa nu hu-wa-ku nu ay-wiy-ang-lay-pan. . i te-ku nu sepaltulu-maw a kiwkay tini i tapang nu banaw nu timilan , tin isa mikacaw tu sanulimaen pacuna a balunga atu mulakuwiyt tu buyu' kya katukuh . . u demiad śį£ŚÄô Al-payse a buyubuyu'an u dihekuay , nika idaw ku talakaway a kitidaan . u kitakit namahini kyu u talakaway , sisa u demiad mahida u sakalamkam sa a kitidaan u talakaway a demiad han . namakay ni i bayu' ku sausi tapabaw, u diheku nu demiad maselep " hinaadihay sa kasenun sa maselep" . I buyu' hinacalilaw nu bali' , kyu u sasay nu buyu' u dihkyay a bali haymaw sa tapabaw , u kasamabesu , kyu malawpes ku akuti' , , kyu u nanum masaatilad , mala udad kyu sisulda . u Al-payse a buyubuyu'an nu talakaw mapuut ku nanum nu bali , kyu u Al-payse a buyubuyu'an nu amisan nu nanum yadah , u timulan han tu sa maacak kuy tiniay a demiad . u alay-ci a sulsuldaan atu hinuki a kilakilangan nayi 18 asiki malingatu pasatni i Al-payse a buyubuyu'an nu demiad amikingkiw , micidek ku puu' nuytiniay idaw ku balangbangan micidekay a bali . yu 20 asiki nu sasayaway idaw tu ku Al-payse a buyubuyu'an nipatideng tu aadihan tu demiad a kitidaan , matulin maini tu dedemiad u mikingkiway tu demiad idaw ku sulit nuheni idaw ku dihebay a hina acak a demiad , mahida nu yi-ta-li nu aw-se-ta a diheb , ci ke-law-pin mikayakay tu buyu' atu i aw-ti-li nu amisan u til-lu-pang han a kitidaan . Śú®20 .

:ar~…ĺp…ôs *s…ô-r~…ĺu-wij-ni-ja:ar~…ĺp…ô ( Ē~ °**r~…ĺp*)*r~…ĺu-man- ¶a:ar~…ĺps)nu u- ¶u satar~…ĺakawaj atu mur~…ĺakuwitaj tu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu bujubuju Ē~ °an , mamin matańßab ku ji-ta-r~…ĺi nu amisan a r~…ĺaad ,ńßuwaku nu war~…ĺian atu nu timur~…ĺan ,zujs…ô ,r~…ĺi-s…ô-tun-s…ô-t…ôn, aw-ti-r~…ĺi t…ôku nu timur~…ĺan atu s…ô-r~…ĺu-wij-ni-ja . *****(**:ar~…ĺp…ôn ( Ē~ °ar~…ĺpn*) *****:ar~…ĺpi ( Ē~ °ar~…ĺpi)***:ar~…ĺp…ôs *******:ar~…ĺp…ô ( Ē~ °**r~…ĺp*)*****:ar~…ĺps) . wijnisa kapańß sad…ôp ńßan par~…ĺatur~…ĺu , namakajni i ti- ¶uŇč ńßaj katukuńß paj-r~…ĺaŇč-ńßuŇč nu tipan ar~…ĺpajs…ô-abuju Ē~ ° sasar~…ĺamaan, u sapakapańß tu udip akitidaan. ar~…ĺpajs…ô abuju Ē~ ° mamin idaw ku *** a buju Ē~ ° mar~…ĺakuwit ku **** a d…ôpańß nu tar~…ĺakaw , ja ¶a ¶ajaj satar~…ĺakawaj u paj-r~…ĺaŇč a tuŇčdud u tar~…ĺakaw nida ****.** a d…ôpańß , tini i nu ńßuwa-ku atu ji-tar~…ĺi nu kasar~…ĺaadan . u nikatatińß…ôpa nu bujubuju Ē~ °an mańßida u baŇčańß , u tanaju Ē~ °sa **** akur~…ĺi , ańß…ôbar~…ĺ sa ***~*** maa ¶ak kujtiniaj a d…ômiad , inajaj ku udad . . ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô a buju nu saka r~…ĺu a nikat…ôpik nu bujubuju Ē~ °an . nuwar~…ĺian a baju Ē~ ° ma ¶…ôbar~…ĺ, kju u ńßuj- ¶u, u- ¶u nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaaatir~…ĺad ° . tabakiaj a matańßab ku kaku nida wajwaj , wijda i madsaatir~…ĺadaj a nika sas…ôtur~…ĺ sa , kinapina pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku kasas…ôtur~…ĺ nu pi ¶ińß , mab…ôr~…ĺin ku tabakiaj a masaba…ôtuaj , maisid tu pina a kur~…ĺi matańßab ku duma a ba…ôtu i pabaw , kju mar~…ĺatabakiaj a nisad…ôpan a mit…ôpik ; nu tipan sa u ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô u masadumaaj a kaku kujda . ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô a bujubuju Ē~ °an nu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan sa , idaw ńß…ônaj ku sip a mas…ôdar~…ĺ pakajni i t…ôban nu timur~…ĺan a kitidaan ; u ¶a ¶aj pasada i nu tipan mi ¶umud i ji-pi-r~…ĺi a subar~…ĺ , u pi-r~…ĺi-niw-s…ô a bujubuju Ē~ °an ; pasajda nu timir~…ĺan u ja-pi-nin a bujubuju Ē~ °an, wijsasa masa ja-pi-nin nu subar~…ĺ tu tat…ôr~…ĺunagn ; amisan atu timur~…ĺan u ŇčaŇčan nida sa u ti-na-r~…ĺa a bujubuju Ē~ °an , mamin mabar~…ĺat ku par~…ĺ-kan a subar~…ĺ nu tipan , mi ¶umud i ti- ¶uŇč-ńßaj a baju Ē~ °, ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj i r~…ĺi-t…ô a subar~…ĺatu saj-pur~…ĺs…ô a subar~…ĺ pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk sa katukuńß i adidiaj a subar~…ĺ ; nu war~…ĺian atu amisan idaw kja ¶a ¶aj u k…ôr~…ĺ-pa ¶in a bujubuju Ē~ °an , itida i tuŇč-u a masa…ônar~…ĺaj nu timur~…ĺan idaw kja masaŇčaŇčiwaj kinatusa muŇčaŇčiw tu makajda i paw- ¶ija-r~…ĺija pat…ôr~…ĺk…ô ńßan katukuńß i duutaj a baju ńßan . . ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô a bujubuju Ē~ °an paini tu u- ¶u tu nananuman , sapananum tu u mańß a tu sapadiŇčki . :p.*. ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô a bujubuju Ē~ °an u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nida kanańßatu ńßatu nu u- ¶u nu **%, nika paini tu u- ¶u **% nu pabawan sananuman , ju kak…ôdar~…ĺan nu d…ômiad atu r~…ĺar~…ĺud . u mir~…ĺan a tukaj idaw ku **% namakajniaj namiŇč i ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô a bujubuju Ē~ °an nipain .*********% :p.*:p.*. u bar~…ĺad nukar~…ĺikid idaw ku *** a nikar~…ĺakar~…ĺak nur~…ĺar~…ĺar~…ĺiwan sapi padiŇčki , nu mińß ¶aan nu sapadiŇčki makaar~…ĺatu ** iku nu wa-t…ô . :p.*. namaka zuj-s…ô nu u- ¶u ku tat…ôr~…ĺuŇča a bar~…ĺad a mar~…ĺikid , mańßida u r~…ĺaj-in a bar~…ĺad r~…ĺuŇč a bar~…ĺad, in a bar~…ĺad, ti- ¶i-nu a bar~…ĺad atu pu a bar~…ĺad , u tataŇčańßan namakajni namiŇč i ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô a bujubuju Ē~ °an , mar~…ĺikid tajda ma ¶apiaja akanatar~…ĺ , sadikudaj sa mi ¶umud i amis a baju Ē~ °, ti- ¶uŇč a baju Ē~ °, ja-t…ô-r~…ĺi-ja a baju Ē~ ° atu r~…ĺum…ôniaj a baju Ē~ ° . duma a bar~…ĺad mańßida u tu-naw a bar~…ĺad , tat…ôr~…ĺunan nu namakaj ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô a bujubuju Ē~ °an . . u r~…ĺuŇč a bar~…ĺad nu ti- ¶uŇč a bajuaj saka tu a tabakiaj a sapananum, mar~…ĺusasa nu ni-r~…ĺu a bar~…ĺad ; u sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan ju amar~…ĺawp…ôs tu mar~…ĺa nu r~…ĺuŇč a bar~…ĺad nu nananuman , mi ¶umud i z…ô-naj-wa a banaw sa mar~…ĺikid a ¶a tajdai ńßu-waku , i ńßuwaku sapi pa ¶u…ôd…ôd tu ńß…ô-n…ôn a diŇčki . r~…ĺaj-in a bar~…ĺad namakaj zuwij-s…ô nu ¶a ¶aj a ** a ¶ubu nu kur~…ĺi a kitidaan , mi ¶ar~…ĺap ku zuwij-s…ô nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu nanum sa **% . **%. ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô a bujubuju Ē~ °an idaw ku mada banawaj , u z…ô-naj-wa u masa bur~…ĺadaj a masabnawaj, tapiiŇčan nu zuj-s…ô u z…ô-naj-wa , duma atapiiŇčan sa nu ńßu-wa-ku nu aj-wij-aŇč-r~…ĺaj-pan. . i t…ô-ku nu s…ôpar~…ĺtur~…ĺu-maw a kiwkaj tini i tapaŇč nu banaw nu timir~…ĺan , tin isa mika ¶aw tu sanur~…ĺima…ôn pa ¶una a bar~…ĺuŇča atu mur~…ĺakuwijt tu buju Ē~ ° kja katukuńß . . u d…ômiad ** ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô a bujubuju Ē~ °an u dińß…ôkuaj , nika idaw ku tar~…ĺakawaj a kitidaan . u kitakit namańßini kju u tar~…ĺakawaj , sisa u d…ômiad mańßida u sakar~…ĺamkam sa a kitidaan u tar~…ĺakawaj a d…ômiad ńßan . namakaj ni i baju Ē~ ° ku sausi tapabaw, u dińß…ôku nu d…ômiad mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp " ńßinaadińßaj sa kas…ônun sa mas…ôr~…ĺ…ôp" . i buju Ē~ ° ńßina ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺaw nu bar~…ĺi Ē~ ° , kju u sasaj nu buju Ē~ ° u dińßkjaj a bar~…ĺi ńßajmaw sa tapabaw , u kasamab…ôsu , kju mar~…ĺawp…ôs ku akuti Ē~ ° , , kju u nanum masaatir~…ĺad , mar~…ĺa udad kju sisur~…ĺda . u ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô a bujubuju Ē~ °an nu tar~…ĺakaw mapuut ku nanum nu bar~…ĺi , kju u ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô a bujubuju Ē~ °an nu amisan nu nanum jadańß , u timur~…ĺan ńßan tu sa maa ¶ak kuj tiniaj a d…ômiad . u ar~…ĺaj- ¶i a sur~…ĺsur~…ĺdaan atu ńßinuki a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan naji ** asiki mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasatni i ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô a bujubuju Ē~ °an nu d…ômiad amikiŇčkiw , mi ¶id…ôk ku puu Ē~ ° nujtiniaj idaw ku bar~…ĺaŇčbaŇčan mi ¶id…ôkaj a bar~…ĺi . ju ** asiki nu sasajawaj idaw tu ku ar~…ĺ-pajs…ô a bujubuju Ē~ °an nipatid…ôŇč tu aadińßan tu d…ômiad a kitidaan , matur~…ĺin maini tu d…ôd…ômiad u mikiŇčkiwaj tu d…ômiad idaw ku sur~…ĺit nuńß…ôni idaw ku dińß…ôbaj a ńßina a ¶ak a d…ômiad , mańßida nu ji-ta-r~…ĺi nu aw-s…ô-ta a dińß…ôb , ¶i k…ô-r~…ĺaw-pin mikajakaj tu buju Ē~ ° atu i aw-ti-r~…ĺi nu amisan u tir~…ĺ-r~…ĺu-paŇč ńßan a kitidaan . *** .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Al-payse a buyu'ťėŅÁąĺŚćĎśĖĮŚĪĪ nilacilan Al-payse a buyu' ; "kamunu te sa Alpen ('alpnŐ©) ; nu yi-tali sa ; Alpi ('alpi)Ôľõnu huwaku sa :Alpes Ôľõse-lu-wiy-ni-ya:Alpe ('√°ňźlp…õ)Ôľõlu-man-ca:Alps)nu u-cu satalakaway atu mulakuwitay tu liwliw nu buyubuyu'an , mamin matahab ku yi-ta-li nu amisan a laad ,huwaku nu walian atu nu timulan ,zuyse ,li-se-tun-se-ten, aw-ti-li teku nu timulan atu se-lu-wiy-ni-ya . ťėŅÁąĺŚćĎśĖĮŚĪĪ(Śĺ∑Ť™ě:Alpen ('alpnŐ©) ÔľõÁĺ©Ś§ßŚą©Ť™ě:Alpi ('alpi)Ôľõś≥ēŤ™ě:Alpes ÔľõśĖĮśīõÁ∂≠ŚįľšļěŤ™ě:Alpe ('√°ňźlp…õ)ÔľõÁĺÖśõľšĽÄŤ™ě:Alps) . wiynisa kapah sadep han palatulu , namakayni i ti-cung hay katukuh pay-lang-hung nu tipan alpayse-abuyu' , namakayni walaytaawseta katukuh pulunna tatahekalan nu buyu' "awtili atu yitali nikalalacal matatihepa" nu tebanay nu alpayse a buyu' namakayni i pulunna a katahekalan nu buyu' katukuh seluwiyniya nu walian alpayse a buyu' . u u-cu yadahay a balad namakayni namin, u nanum nida u kapahay , u aidangan, sasalamaan, u sapakapah tu udip akitidaan. Alpayse abuyu' mamin idaw ku 128 a buyu' malakuwit ku 4000 a depah nu talakaw , ya cacayay satalakaway u pay-lang a tungdud u talakaw nida 4810.45 a depah , tini i nu huwa-ku atu yi-tali nu kasalaadan . u nikatatihepa nu buyubuyu'an mahida u bangah , u tanayu'sa 1200 akuli , ahebal sa 130~260 kuli , palecad han u talakaw sa 3000 a depah , pulung nu ahebal sa tutu a emang cubu kuli . Al-payse abuyu' nu amisan u nanum nu bali kuyadahay , u timulan sa maacak kuytiniay a demiad , inayay ku udad . . Al-payse a buyu nu saka lu a nikatepik nu buyubuyu'an . nuwalian a bayu' macebal, kyu u huy-cu, u-cu nu lalaaatilad masasetul musaungay ; yu mahidahenay sa , nu hu-cu maletak ya masaatiladay maisid pasayda I nu amisan, yu mahida mautang tu malingatu atu u-cu a masaatiladay masasetul , kinapina mahahabelut kumaputun , u tabakiay nu sapitahab tu kaku nida maadih kuwayway , wiyda u kasasetul nu atilad sa , haymawsa tapabaw mu tahekal mala Al-payse abuyu' . tabakiay a matahab ku kaku nida wayway , wiyda I madsaatiladay a nika sasetul sa , kinapina pihaceng ku kasasetul nu picih , mabelin ku tabakiay a masabaetuay , maisid tu pina a kuli matahab ku duma a baetu i pabaw , kyu malatabakiay a nisadepan a mitepik ; nu tipan sa u Al-payse u masadumaay a kaku kuyda . Al-payse a buyubuyu'an nu tatelungan sa , idaw henay ku sip a masedal pakayni i teban nu timulan a kitidaan ; u cacay pasada i nu tipan micumud i yi-pi-li a subal , u pi-li-niw-se a buyubuyu'an ; pasayda nu timilan u ya-pi-nin a buyubuyu'an, wiysasa masa ya-pi-nin nu subal tu tatelunagn ; amisan atu timulan u ngangan nida sa u ti-na-la a buyubuyu'an , mamin mabalat ku pal-kan a subal nu tipan , micumud i ti-cung-hay a bayu', macaliway i li-te a subalatu say-pulse a subal patelek sa katukuh i adidiay a subal ; nu walian atu amisan idaw kya cacay u kel-pacin a buyubuyu'an , itida i tung-u a masaenalay nu timulan idaw kya masangangiway kinatusa mungangiw tu makayda i paw-ciya-liya patelke han katukuh i duutay a bayu han . . Al-payse a buyubuyu'an paini tu u-cu tu nananuman , sapananum tu u mah a tu sapadingki . :p.5. Al-payse a buyubuyu'an u ahebal nida kanahatu hatu nu u-cu nu 11%, nika paini tu u-cu 90% nu pabawan sananuman , yu kakedalan nu demiad atu lalud . u milan a tukay idaw ku 80% namakayniay naming i Al-payse a buyubuyu'an nipain .ÁĪ≥Ťė≠Á≠ČŚüéŚłāŚįĪśúČ80% :p.9:p.1. u balad nukalikid idaw ku 500 a nikalakalak nulalaliwan sapi padingki , nu mihcaan nu sapadingki makaalatu 29 iku nu wa-te . :p.8. namaka zuy-se nu u-cu ku tatelunga a balad a malikid , mahida u lay-in a balad lung a balad, in a balad, ti-ci-nu a balad atu pu a balad , u tatangahan namakayni naming i Al-payse a buyubuyu'an , malikid tayda macapiaya akanatal , sadikuday sa micumud i amis a bayu', ti-cung a bayu', ya-te-li-ya a bayu' atu lumeniay a bayu' . duma a balad mahida u tu-naw a balad , tatelunan nu namakay Al-payse a buyubuyu'an . . u lung a balad nu ti-cung a bayuay saka tu a tabakiay a sapananum, malusasa nu ni-lu a balad ; u sulsuldaan yu amalawpes tu mala nu lung a balad nu nananuman , micumud i ze-nay-wa a banaw sa malikid aca taydai hu-waku , i huwaku sapi pacueded tu he-nen a dingki . lay-in a balad namakay zuwiy-se nu cacay a 30 acubu nu kuli a kitidaan , micalap ku zuwiy-se nipatahekal tu nanum sa 60% . 60%. Al-payse a buyubuyu'an idaw ku mada banaway , u ze-nay-wa u masa buladay a masabnaway, tapiingan nu zuy-se u ze-nay-wa , duma atapiingan sa nu hu-wa-ku nu ay-wiy-ang-lay-pan. . i te-ku nu sepaltulu-maw a kiwkay tini i tapang nu banaw nu timilan , tin isa mikacaw tu sanulimaen pacuna a balunga atu mulakuwiyt tu buyu' kya katukuh . . u demiad śį£ŚÄô Al-payse a buyubuyu'an u dihekuay , nika idaw ku talakaway a kitidaan . u kitakit namahini kyu u talakaway , sisa u demiad mahida u sakalamkam sa a kitidaan u talakaway a demiad han . namakay ni i bayu' ku sausi tapabaw, u diheku nu demiad maselep " hinaadihay sa kasenun sa maselep" . I buyu' hinacalilaw nu bali' , kyu u sasay nu buyu' u dihkyay a bali haymaw sa tapabaw , u kasamabesu , kyu malawpes ku akuti' , , kyu u nanum masaatilad , mala udad kyu sisulda . u Al-payse a buyubuyu'an nu talakaw mapuut ku nanum nu bali , kyu u Al-payse a buyubuyu'an nu amisan nu nanum yadah , u timulan han tu sa maacak kuy tiniay a demiad . u alay-ci a sulsuldaan atu hinuki a kilakilangan nayi 18 asiki malingatu pasatni i Al-payse a buyubuyu'an nu demiad amikingkiw , micidek ku puu' nuytiniay idaw ku balangbangan micidekay a bali . yu 20 asiki nu sasayaway idaw tu ku Al-payse a buyubuyu'an nipatideng tu aadihan tu demiad a kitidaan , matulin maini tu dedemiad u mikingkiway tu demiad idaw ku sulit nuheni idaw ku dihebay a hina acak a demiad , mahida nu yi-ta-li nu aw-se-ta a diheb , ci ke-law-pin mikayakay tu buyu' atu i aw-ti-li nu amisan u til-lu-pang han a kitidaan . Śú®20 .
